addonDescription.message: A minimal, less attention-grabbing internet experience.

pageActionDefaultTitle.description: Displayed when hovering the page action badge.

minimalStyle.description: Label for the main per-site enable/disable toggle.

statusActive.description: Popup status when the extension is enabled on the current site.

statusDisabled.description: Popup status when the extension is disabled on the current site.

statusUnsupported.description: Popup status when the current site has no Minimal support.

statusNoAccess.description: Popup status when the extension cannot access the current page.

statusError.description: Popup status when the per-site state failed to load.

pickElement.description: Button that starts the element picker.

optionsHeader.description: Heading for the site-specific options section.

optHideViewCounts.description: Option toggle to hide view counts.

optHideLikeCounts.description: Option toggle to hide like and dislike counts.

optVoteCounts.description: Label for the vote count display option.

segVisible.description: Segmented control option: vote counts visible.

segDots.description: Segmented control option: vote counts shown as dots.

segHidden.description: Segmented control option: vote counts hidden.

hiddenElements.description: Heading for the list of user-hidden elements.

clearAll.description: Button that unhides all user-hidden elements.

noHidden.description: Empty-state text when no elements have been hidden.

unhide.description: Button that unhides a single element.
